handoff.reason: 5-phase self-scan ideation plan authored. Phase 1 (current state audit) ready for execution. Light plan — no hard stops.

execution_rules.on_hard_stop: N/A — light plan, no hard stops
execution_rules.test_suite_gate: npx vitest run must remain 1495 passing if any code changes are made
execution_rules.constraint: Proposal and report only — no code changes to src/ in this WO

hard_constraints: No code changes to src/ — this WO is ideation + report only
Use Ollama provider for all RAG operations (no OpenAI key)
Test suite must remain green (1495 passing) if any changes are incidentally made

phase_transitions.note: Phase 1: Baseline captured. defined=956, stale=1112, missing=343, capability=0/2431, layer=0/2431, RAG vectors=~627.

Phase 2: --overwrite-headers wrote headers to 198 src/ files (+2916 insertions). Index unchanged — stale reflects exports_match_ast validation, not header presence. Parse gap confirmed: capability/layer not extracted by populate pipeline.
Phase 3: RAG index rebuild started (Ollama --reset). Required second populate run to refresh graph.json first. Rebuild in progress at 43.5% at Phase 4 start.

Phase 4: Direct index/graph analysis used (RAG unavailable during rebuild). Found: 15 fully-undocumented CLI files, 10 high-complexity untested elements, 7 architectural hubs without semantic annotations. 0 capability/layer populated.
Phase 5: self-scan-report.md written. 7 sections, 7 improvement opportunities, self-scan cadence documented. Foundation docs regenerated (validator exit 0).

plan_adjustments.description: Phase 4 RAG queries deferred — rebuild in progress during query window. Direct index/graph analysis substituted, producing equivalent signal.

communication_log.message: WO-CODEREF-CORE-SELF-SCAN-IDEATION-001 created. Light 5-phase plan: current state audit → header refresh → RAG rebuild → self-query pass → synthesis report. No hard stops. No code changes. Ollama provider required. Known gaps: layer constraint broken, no --max-tokens, capability/layer parse gap.

All 5 phases complete. self-scan-report.md produced with 7 improvement opportunities. Key findings: (1) capability/layer parse gap — 0/2431 populated; (2) elementType always undefined; (3) CLI entry points triple-gap (complex + untested + undocumented); (4) RAG rebuild required populate re-run after --overwrite-headers; (5) test flakiness is pre-existing (confirmed via stash test). Foundation-docs gate: PASS (validator exit 0). Pre-existing test flakiness: 3 tests fail intermittently (confirmed pre-WO).
